programmes.title: North by Northwest
programmes.description: Advertising man Roger Thornhill is mistaken for a spy, triggering a deadly cross-country chase. Famous for a wild plane attack and a harrowing chase across the faces of Mount Rushmore, this is quintessential Hitchcock.

programmes.title: Vertigo
programmes.description: A retired San Francisco detective suffering from acrophobia investigates the strange activities of an old friend's wife, all the while becoming dangerously obsessed with her.

programmes.title: Oppenheimer
programmes.description: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II. An unprecedented cinematic event, Oppenheimer features an all-star cast that includes Emily Blunt, Oscar? winner Matt Damon, Oscar? nominee Robert Downey Jr., Oscar? nominee Florence Pugh, Josh Hartnett, and Oscar? winners Casey Affleck, Rami Malek and Kenneth Branagh.

programmes.title: Insomnia
programmes.description: A sleep-deprived detective plays an intense cat-and-mouse game with a sly murderer in a remote Alaska town. Now, as an idealistic local detective (Hilary Swank) investigates the case, and the stakes rise, Dormer's sanity begins to falter.
